title: Do not market ProductOS as a fully autonomous PM system yet
rejection_reason: The current product and messaging bundle is stronger and clearer, but ProductOS still depends on explicit PM review, validation lanes, and bounded governance rather than unattended autonomous operation.
failure_signals: Unattended market refresh remains a documented follow-up gap rather than a proven runtime guarantee.
Leadership-facing communication still requires PM approval and should not be positioned as self-authorizing automation.
retry_conditions: Retry after autonomous-claim surfaces are backed by runtime enforcement and explicit benchmark proof.
Retry after publication policies and claim boundaries are validated for external distribution.
retained_lessons: Clearer messaging is valuable only when it remains subordinate to product truth.
Marketing confidence should increase after proof and governance improve, not before.
